title: Bornean Orangutans Pair Medicinal Plants in Patterns That Hint at Ancient Pharmacy
description: Orangutan self-medication confirmed in 55 apes: a 20-year University of Exeter study finds Bornean orangutans consistently pair anti-inflammatory medicinal plants in non-random sequences that parallel Dayak folk medicine, suggesting active wound treatment predates all written human medical records by millions of years.

title: Can an ancient Oromo philosophy help Ethiopia build peace? Why Namummaa matters
description: The Oromo place great emphasis on relationships, mutual care and responsibility towards others.

title: Srisailam temple to publish ancient inscriptions discovered at ‘Ghanta Matam’
description: Srisailam Temple to publish inscriptions from 'Ghanta Matam' and enhance amenities for devotees, including new facilities and lighting.

title: Scientists discover ancient neurons that control attention
description: Surprising find by Hopkins researchers could be initial step toward better ADHD treatments

title: From Ancient Persia...: Iran Leaves Heartfelt 'Thank You Note' In LA Locker Room: Call For Peace
description: The Iranian football team left a handwritten letter in the locker room after their 0-0 draw against Belgium. This was the second of the two games the Asian side played in Los Angeles.
